**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Feilong Technology Co., Ltd. is a verified, actively operating small-to-medium enterprise (SME) specializing in electronic components and specialized materials. Established in 2006 with a 15 million RMB registered capital (1.5 million RMB paid-in), it functions as a wholly-owned corporate subsidiary rather than a natural person startup. Crucially, the company maintains a robust workforce of 54 insured employees (2024) and is headquartered in a dedicated building ('Building 02, No. 80 Xingang Avenue') within the Nanjing Economic and Technological Development Zone. This alignment of a substantial workforce, a dedicated industrial address, and a highly focused business scope confirms that it is a legitimate physical manufacturer and R&D node, likely producing electronic components and power electronics for regional supply chains, rather than acting as a hollow trading shell.
